style_effects: Gentle ripples of liquid light undulate around Bulbasaur's body, with tiny water droplets clinging to its mossy skin and rising in slow, shimmering spirals. A soft, cool blue aura pulses gently from its pores, casting a serene luminescence that illuminates the surrounding mist like a deep ocean at dawn. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
